title: Rhea Vendors Group SpA ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] Rhea Vendors Group SpA is an Italy-based global company specializing in manufacturing vending machines for hot and cold drinks and snacks. Founded in 1960, the company utilizes advanced technology and innovative designs to deliver high-quality products. Their products range from custom-designed vending machines to fully automatic coffee machines. They cater to a broad range of industries, including offices, retail, and hospitality.
